pages.title: City Gas Station Simulator
pages.description:
Manage fuel pumps and customer queues in a dynamic service station environment where timing and multitasking are key mechanics. Balancing customer satisfaction and resource allocation provides a steady challenge across shifting day and night cycles.

Key Features

• Fuel pump management system  
• Customer queue multitasking

• Day and night cycle effects

• Fuel pump control mechanics
